expectations.evidence: File saved as '01-timeouts-and-caps-knobs-actionables.md' (single dash, not '--' separator).

expectations.text: Every File path named in steps exists in the ACE repo at run time (no invented paths)
expectations.evidence: Agent explored live and cited real line numbers.

expectations.text: Steps reference the five files: lib/config/runtimeConfig.js, config/runtime-ops.json, graph/nodes/planner.js, graph/nodes/textWorker.js, services/profileMerge.js
Includes shared header sections: Goal, Preconditions, AC to verification, Do not touch, Deviations
expectations.evidence: Missing Preconditions (uses 'Pre-flight'), AC→verification table (uses 'Decisions' block), and Deviations (no such section). Has Goal + 'Out of scope'.

expectations.text: Each ticket AC is either mapped to >=1 step + >=1 verification row OR explicitly addressed by a Deviation
expectations.evidence: ACs are covered implicitly via numbered steps and a 'Decisions' block, but no explicit AC→step→verification table or Deviations section.

expectations.text: No step contains a paste-ready full working implementation (sketches only, <=15 lines)
Includes Final verification section with the jest commands from the ticket
Header carries a stale-path regeneration warning
Deviations section present, capturing AC-vs-live-code conflicts as one-liners (revision verification)
expectations.evidence: Baseline has no Deviations section; the AC-vs-code conflicts surface as a 'Decisions made up front' block instead.
